answer:
Based on the CLAUDE.md file in this project, the `log.md` format is:

```
## [YYYY-MM-DD] <op> | <title>
<optional detail — which pages touched, what changed>
```

Valid ops are: `scan`, `ingest`, `query`, `lint`, `create`, `update`, `delete`, `note`.

You can grep recent entries with: `grep "^## \[" log.md | tail -10`

<DONE>
